action.reasoning: Observation: cnxt2.pt trained with seed=123, 4 epochs, val_acc 0.60. Best so far is 0.7879 (single ConvNeXt). Need to test ensemble of cnxt + cnxt2 (without CLIP). Analysis: Currently predict.py includes cnxt2.pt and cnxt3.pt. Since CLIP hurt, I should remove clip from ensemble. Let me modify predict.py to only ensemble convnext models. Decision: Update predict.py to ensemble best.pt + cnxt2.pt only (skip clip). Submit eval.
